stopConditions: Any candidate, fixture, engine-contract, verification, or manifest change after this review invalidates this digest-bound evidence and requires a fresh independent review run.
Any later reviewer disagreement or editorial rejection blocks publication of the whole immutable batch.
notes: Independent Atlas mechanical review restarted from zero after source and engine repair and passed at exact HEAD b88cc37. All 300 repaired frozen fixtures replayed byte-equivalently through evaluateProblem and all 456 newly executed probes passed. The fresh matrix covered two-, three-, and four-space child indentation where applicable, tab indentation, alternative bullet and ordered markers, valid ordered starts, child placement beneath different parent items, sibling-versus-descendant separation, third-depth rejection, hidden block wrappers, nested block exclusions, exact root anatomy, invisible HTML/comment/definition/break/divider/whitespace/control/zero-width/raw-NUL content, literal U+FFFD, mixed-visible content, inline code and image alt boundaries, and source offsets spanning astral text, an earlier raw NUL, and CRLF. All 96 candidate-specific direct checks were exercised. No ID, contentVariant, normalized-target, teaching-example, or vocabulary-term-set collision exists against the 320 published problems.
